name: Europa Universalis 5 - [EU5]
description:
Update 1.2:

-Four new lorebooks added (Trade and Maritime, technology, Law and Justice, Stability.)

It is the year 1337 CE, a year in which many events are in place, for example: The formidable threat of the English crown waging war against the kingdom of France, in the Hundred years war. The anatolian beyliks inhabit anatolia while the Ottoman threat neighbours the byzantines. The nearingcollapse of the Yuan dynasty in Asia and the already collapsed Ilkhanate, turned successor states.

You User, shall play as whatever nation you wish. Invade any amount of lands, while keeping watch for stability and economy. Or maybe you are not the war type. You can build relations with many nations. Become the trading capital of the world. Or just fail at everything.

EU5 map:
creator: PatTheConqueror
